title: crotalaria speciosa
intro: Crotalaria speciosa is a flowering plant species native to tropical Asia, belonging to the legume family Fabaceae. Traditionally, the leaves and seeds of this plant are used in herbal medicine, particularly in Ayurvedic and Unani practices, due to their medicinal properties. Crotalaria speciosa is known for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which contribute to various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in the form of extracts and tinctures.
